label: Ability
description: Defines an activated ability usable by a pawn, including psycasts, ideology abilities, gene abilities, and anomaly powers.

abilityClass.label: Ability class
abilityClass.description: C# class (Ability subclass) used to instantiate this ability at runtime.

gizmoClass.label: Gizmo class
gizmoClass.description: C# class (Command_Ability subclass) used to create the gizmo button for this ability.

comps.label: Components
comps.description: List of AbilityCompProperties objects that attach modular behaviors. Each item specifies a Class attribute.

category.label: Category
category.description: AbilityCategoryDef grouping this ability in the UI.

displayOrder.label: Display order
displayOrder.description: Sort order within the ability category. Lower values appear first.

statBases.label: Stat bases
statBases.description: Map of stat names to their base values for this ability. Child element names are StatDef defNames.

verbProperties.label: Verb properties
verbProperties.description: Attack verb configuration for this ability, including range and targeting parameters.

hotKey.label: Hot key
hotKey.description: KeyBindingDef used to activate this ability via keyboard shortcut.

jobDef.label: Job def
jobDef.description: JobDef given to the caster pawn when this ability is activated.

warmupMote.label: Warmup mote
warmupMote.description: ThingDef for the mote spawned around the caster during the warmup phase.

warmupEffecter.label: Warmup effecter
warmupEffecter.description: EffecterDef played on the caster during the warmup phase.

emittedFleck.label: Emitted fleck
emittedFleck.description: FleckDef spawned repeatedly at the caster during the warmup phase.

emissionInterval.label: Emission interval
emissionInterval.description: Ticks between each emittedFleck spawn during warmup.

warmupMoteSocialSymbol.label: Warmup mote social symbol
warmupMoteSocialSymbol.description: Texture atlas path for the symbol drawn above the caster's head during warmup.

warmupStartSound.label: Warmup start sound
warmupStartSound.description: SoundDef played once when the warmup phase begins.

warmupSound.label: Warmup sound
warmupSound.description: SoundDef looped during the warmup phase.

warmupPreEndSound.label: Warmup pre-end sound
warmupPreEndSound.description: SoundDef played a fixed number of seconds before the warmup phase ends.

warmupPreEndSoundSeconds.label: Warmup pre-end sound seconds
warmupPreEndSoundSeconds.description: Seconds before warmup completion at which warmupPreEndSound is played.

moteDrawOffset.label: Mote draw offset
moteDrawOffset.description: World-space offset (x, y, z) applied when drawing the warmup mote relative to the caster.

moteOffsetAmountTowardsTarget.label: Mote offset amount towards target
moteOffsetAmountTowardsTarget.description: Distance the warmup mote is shifted along the vector towards the selected target.

canUseAoeToGetTargets.label: Can use AoE to get targets
canUseAoeToGetTargets.description: If true, the ability may derive its target list from the AoE radius rather than a single selected target.

useAverageTargetPositionForWarmupEffecte.label: Use average target position for warmup effecter
useAverageTargetPositionForWarmupEffecte.description: If true, the warmup effecter is positioned at the average of all selected targets rather than the primary target.

targetRequired.label: Target required
targetRequired.description: If true, the player must select a target before the ability can be activated.

targetWorldCell.label: Target world cell
targetWorldCell.description: If true, the ability targets a world map cell rather than a local map cell.

showGizmoOnWorldView.label: Show gizmo on world view
showGizmoOnWorldView.description: If true, the ability gizmo is visible while the player is on the world map.

aiCanUse.label: AI can use
aiCanUse.description: If true, AI-controlled pawns are allowed to activate this ability.

ai_SearchAOEForTargets.label: AI: search AoE for targets
ai_SearchAOEForTargets.description: AI hint: if true, the AI searches within the ability's AoE radius for valid targets.

ai_IsOffensive.label: AI: is offensive
ai_IsOffensive.description: AI hint: if true, the AI treats this ability as an offensive action.

ai_IsIncendiary.label: AI: is incendiary
ai_IsIncendiary.description: AI hint: if true, the AI knows this ability can set things on fire.

groupAbility.label: Group ability
groupAbility.description: If true, all pawns in the caster's group use this ability simultaneously.

level.label: Level
level.description: Psycast tier required to unlock this ability. 0 means no level requirement.

cooldownTicksRange.label: Cooldown ticks range
cooldownTicksRange.description: Randomized cooldown duration in ticks drawn from this range each use.

cooldownPerCharge.label: Cooldown per charge
cooldownPerCharge.description: If true, the cooldown applies per charge consumed rather than per cast.

hasExternallyHandledCooldown.label: Has externally handled cooldown
hasExternallyHandledCooldown.description: If true, the cooldown is managed by external logic rather than the standard ability cooldown system.

charges.label: Charges
charges.description: Number of charges available before the ability goes on cooldown. -1 means unlimited.

groupDef.label: Group def
groupDef.description: AbilityGroupDef that links this ability's cooldown with other abilities in the same group.

overrideGroupCooldown.label: Override group cooldown
overrideGroupCooldown.description: If true, this ability's own cooldown overrides the shared group cooldown on use.

requiredMemes.label: Required memes
requiredMemes.description: List of MemeDef references. The caster's ideo must contain all listed memes for this ability to be available.

sendLetterOnCooldownComplete.label: Send letter on cooldown complete
sendLetterOnCooldownComplete.description: If true, a letter is sent to the player when this ability finishes its cooldown.

sendMessageOnCooldownComplete.label: Send message on cooldown complete
sendMessageOnCooldownComplete.description: If true, a UI message is displayed when this ability finishes its cooldown.

displayGizmoWhileUndrafted.label: Display gizmo while undrafted
displayGizmoWhileUndrafted.description: If true, the ability gizmo is shown even when the pawn is not drafted.

disableGizmoWhileUndrafted.label: Disable gizmo while undrafted
disableGizmoWhileUndrafted.description: If true, the ability gizmo is greyed out when the pawn is not drafted.

writeCombatLog.label: Write combat log
writeCombatLog.description: If true, ability use is recorded in the combat log.

stunTargetWhileCasting.label: Stun target while casting
stunTargetWhileCasting.description: If true, the primary target is stunned for the duration of the warmup phase.

showPsycastEffects.label: Show psycast effects
showPsycastEffects.description: If true, the standard psycast visual and sound effects are played on cast.

showCastingProgressBar.label: Show casting progress bar
showCastingProgressBar.description: If true, a progress bar is drawn above the caster during the warmup phase.

detectionChanceOverride.label: Detection chance override
detectionChanceOverride.description: Override for the probability (0–1) of this ability being detected by enemies. -1 means derive from the Ability_DetectChancePerEntropy stat.

uiOrder.label: UI order
uiOrder.description: Sort order within the ability gizmo bar. Lower values appear first.

waitForJobEnd.label: Wait for job end
waitForJobEnd.description: If true, the ability waits until the pawn's current job is finished before activating.

showWhenDrafted.label: Show when drafted
showWhenDrafted.description: If true, the ability gizmo is visible in the drafted state.

showOnCharacterCard.label: Show on character card
showOnCharacterCard.description: If true, this ability is listed on the pawn's character card.

hostile.label: Hostile
hostile.description: If true, using this ability counts as a hostile action and can trigger faction relations changes.

casterMustBeCapableOfViolence.label: Caster must be capable of violence
casterMustBeCapableOfViolence.description: If true, pacifist pawns cannot use this ability.

confirmationDialogText.label: Confirmation dialog text
confirmationDialogText.description: Localized text shown in a confirmation dialog before the ability activates. Leave empty to skip the dialog.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Texture atlas path for the ability's gizmo icon.

basic-ability.label: Basic Ability
basic-ability.description: Minimal ability def with a label.
